node.title: CopenhagenJS May - Veo Technologies
node.description:
Hello all,
Are you ready for the May edition of CopenhagenJS?
**Veo Technologies** hosts us on the 7th of May.

**\#\# Schedule**:
17:15 Doors open
17:45 Welcome
18:00 TBD
18:30 Break with food and drinks
19:15 **Tobbe Lundebrg - Postgres-to-React Realtime Data Sync Using GraphQL @live Queries**
19:45 Raffle
19:55 Group photo
20:00 Socializing - Meet the community
21:00 See you next time!

**\#\# What is CopenhagenJS?**
CopenhagenJS is a community group in Copenhagen for all JavaScript developers. We get together and share things we work on and like. We talk about various technologies we use daily or aspire to use.

**\#\# Can I present something at CopenhagenJS?**
CopenhagenJS is for and by the community, so you are **more than welcome** to talk about things that you find interesting, and we will assist you with your speaking if you are new or have any difficulties.
You can contact us with a private message or comment here on meetup.com, or on any social network where you can find us.

Remember to follow us on:
**Linkedin:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/copenhagenjs/

**We are looking forward to seeing you!**

Friendly regards
Zoey, Jonathan, Gojko and Svetlana

node.title: CopenhagenJS March - Prosa
node.description:
Hello everyone,
It's time for the March edition of CopenhagenJS — and this time we're doing things a little differently! We're teaming up with **Prosa** for a special evening with an interactive **roundtable discussion on the Job Market in the AI Era**. Come ready to share your thoughts, experiences, and questions!

## Schedule:

17:15 Doors open
17:45 Roundtable: Job Market in the AI Era
18:30 Break with food and drinks
19:15 Q&A: Job Market in the AI Era
20:00 Group Photo
20:05 Socialising - Meet the community
21:00 See you next time!

## About CopenhagenJS

CopenhagenJS is a community group in Copenhagen for all JavaScript developers. We get together and share things we work on and like. We talk about various technologies that we either use daily or aspire to use.

## Want to Present?

CopenhagenJS is for and by the community, so you are more than welcome to talk about things that you find interesting and we will assist you with your speaking if you are new or have any difficulties. You can contact us by sending a private message or comment here on meetup.com or any social network where you can find us.

## Stay Connected

Follow us on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/55050411/)

We're looking forward to seeing you at the event!

Best regards,
Zoey, Jonathan, Gojko and Svetlana

CopenhagenJS is a welcoming community for JavaScript developers in Copenhagen. We meet regularly to share ideas, projects, and technologies we're excited about—from daily tools to experimental frameworks.

**\#\# Want to Present?**
CopenhagenJS is **by the community, for the community**. If you want to share something, we’d love to hear from you! New speakers are welcome—we’re happy to help you prepare and feel confident. Just message us here on Meetup or any of our social platforms.

**Stay Connected**

node.title: CopenhagenJS February - Veo Technologies
node.description:
Hello everyone,

We hope you've had a wonderful holiday season and are energized for 2025. We're excited to kick things off with our next CopenhagenJS event
with the support of **Veo Technologies**.

**IMPORTANT: Registration Process**
To attend this event, please complete two steps:

1. Click the "Attend" button on the Meetup page.
2. Fill out our form: [https://forms.gle/w82438Yjxi7Z8A747](https://forms.gle/w82438Yjxi7Z8A747)

This form helps us better understand our audience and tailor the event to your needs.

**\#\# Schedule**:
17:00 Doors open
17:45 Welcome
18:00 "window.ai" Chrome's tiny AI in the browser - Sebastian Florian
18:30 Break with food and drinks
19:15 Web Accessibility in React Applications - Iga Wacławska
19:45 Raffle
19:55 Group photo
20:00 Socializing - Meet the community
21:00 See you next time!

**\#\# What is CopenhagenJS?**
We're a vibrant community of JavaScript developers in Copenhagen who come together to share our passion for code. Whether you're building cutting-edge applications or exploring new frameworks, you'll find kindred spirits here. Our meetups are a place to discover what fellow developers are working on, discuss emerging technologies, and exchange ideas about the tools we use daily.

**\#\# Can I present something at CopenhagenJS?**
Have something interesting to share? We'd love to hear from you! Whether you're a seasoned speaker or your first time presenting, our supportive community welcomes all voices. We're here to help you craft and deliver your talk, so don't hesitate to step forward. You can contact us with a private message or comment here on meetup.com.

Remember to follow us on **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/copenhagenjs

Looking forward to seeing you!

Friendly regards
Jonathan, Zoey, Islam and Svetlana

node.title: CopenhagenJS October - PROSA
node.description:
**IMPORTANT: Registration Process**
To attend this event, please complete two steps:

1. Click the "Attend" button on the Meetup page.
2. Fill out our audience survey form: [https://forms.gle/B2R1yUnjhtKwdFEEA](https://forms.gle/B2R1yUnjhtKwdFEEA) This form helps us better understand our audience and tailor the event to your needs.

**Navigating Your First Tech Job - A Guide for Junior Developers**
We're excited to announce our upcoming event in collaboration with PROSA, specially designed for our junior members who are on the hunt for their first job in tech!

**Featured Presenter**
We are thrilled to welcome **Álvaro José Agámez Licha** as our guest speaker. Álvaro is a Senior Software Engineer with over 18 years of experience, he has also experience in an Engineering Leadership role, either as Team Lead or Lead Developer. He will share valuable insights on how to find a software developer job, offering practical advice and strategies for those starting their careers.

**About CopenhagenJS**
CopenhagenJS is a vibrant community for JavaScript developers in Copenhagen. We come together to share our work, discuss our favourite technologies, and explore new tools we're excited about or use in our daily workflows.

**Want to Present?**
CopenhagenJS thrives on community participation! We warmly welcome presentations on topics you find fascinating. If you're new to speaking or need any support, our team is here to help. Reach out to us via private message on Meetup or through any of our social media channels.

**Stay Connected**
Follow us on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/copenhagenjs/)

**We're looking forward to seeing you at the event!**

Best regards,
Jonathan, Zoey and Svetlana

node.title: CopenhagenJS February - Veo Technologies
node.description:
Hello everyone,

We trust you enjoyed your holidays and found time to embark on the new year in high spirits.
It's time to announce the upcoming CopenhagenJS event, this time with the support of **Veo Technologies**.

**\#\# Schedule**:
17:00 Doors open
17:45 Welcome
18:00 How I created a digital assistant using JavaScript & OpenAI - Konstantinos Theologitis
18:30 Break with food and drinks
19:15 Form generator based on a JSON schema - Ramiro Estrella
19:45 Raffle
19:55 Group photo
20:00 Socializing - Meet the community
21:00 See you next time!

**\#\# What is CopenhagenJS?**
CopenhagenJS is a community group in Copenhagen for all JavaScript developers. We get together and share things we work on and like. We talk about various technologies that we either use on a day-to-day basis or aspire to use.

**\#\# Can I present something at CopenhagenJS?**
CopenhagenJS is for and by the community, so you are **more than welcome** to talk about things that you find interesting and we will assist you with your speaking if you are new or have any difficulties.
You can contact us with a private message or comment here on meetup.com, or on any social network where you can find us.

Remember to follow us on **Twitter**: https://twitter.com/copenhagenjs
Looking forward to seeing you!

Friendly regards
Jonathan, Zoey, John and Svetlana

node.title: CopenhagenJS November - Prosa
node.description:
Hello everyone,
It is time for the November edition of **CopenhagenJS**!

**\#\# Schedule**:
17:00 Doors open
17:45 Welcome
18:00 Journey into Enigmatic Realms: Unraveling Mysteries through API Exploration - Jakub Cioslowski
18:30 Break with food and drinks
19:15 HTMX and Node.js/Bun: A Dynamic Duo for Web Development - Alvaro Agámez
19:45 Group photo
19:50 Socializing - Meet the community
21:00 See you next time!

**\#\# What is CopenhagenJS?**
CopenhagenJS is a community group in Copenhagen for all JavaScript developers. We get together and share things we work on and really like. We talk about various technologies that we either use on a day-to-day basis or aspire to use.

**\#\# Can I present something at CopenhagenJS?**
Definitely, CopenhagenJS is for and by the community, so you are more than welcome to talk about things that you find interesting and we will assist you with your speaking if you are new or have any difficulties. You can contact us with a private message or comment here on meetup.com, or on any social network where you can find us.

Remember to follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/copenhagenjs

Looking forward to seeing you!

Friendly regards
Jonathan, Zoey, John and Svetlana
